profiles.bio: 7 years and received my barber license from Emily Griffith in downtown Denver in 2019. I have continued my education by enrolling in the Vic blends academy since 2019, barber josh op 1 year course and Amos academy by Julius Caesar. I look forward to servicing you and making you fresh!

Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information Butler's Barber Lounge Studio 1 at Sola Salons Lafayette BOOK NOW Meet Sean Butler Hey my name is Sean butler and I am a Licensed barber in Lafayette Colorado. I found my passion of barbering when I met a seasoned barber named JOVE in Los Angeles who inspired me to throw myself into this craft. I have now been cutting for over 7 years and received my barber license from Emily Griffith in downtown Denver in 2019. I have continued my education by enrolling in the Vic blends academy since 2019, barber josh op 1 year course and Amos academy by Julius Caesar. I look forward to servicing you and making you fresh! Sola has over 750 locations nationwide and is the home of over 20,000 independent, industry-leading beauty professionals. Contact Luxe + Lather – Johnathan Walker Studio 14 at Sola Salons Lafayette (303) 905-4834 Primary Services Barber Hair Business Info Location Luxe + Lather – Johnathan Walker Studio 14 at Sola Salons Lafayette 385 Crossing Drive, Lafayette, CO 80026 GET DIRECTIONS Website https://luxelather.glossgenius.com/ Hours of Operation Contact business. Availability Accepting New Clients, By Appointment Only Services Haircuts and Other Men's Haircut A customized haircut designed by your stylist to fit your individual style and preferences. Child's Haircut A customized children's haircut designed by your stylist to fit your individual style and preferences. Barbering Traditional Shave The traditional Straight Razor Shave includes application of a steam towel to open up the pores and soften the hair follicle. Hot lather is applied and you will receive a first pass shave with the grain of the beard. A second application of hot lather follows, with second shave against the grain for a closer shave. A cool towel is applied to close the pores. Barber Steam Facial Includes application of a steam towel to open up the pores, a facial wash, exfoliating scrub and a light facial massage. Traditional Barber Haircut Traditional Barber's Haircut includes cut, style, hot lather straight razor around the ears and on the back of the neck with a hot towel and a quick shoulder massage. Beard

profiles.bio: Spot, I am a Colorado native. I specialize in manicures, pedicures, and gel nails. I only buy products sold to professionals. I also use a copper bowl that is anti-microbial does not hold any bacteria. every implement that I use is sanitized and cleaned after each client.I take my sanitation very seriously, not not all nail techs and clients are compatible and that's OK! but if you like the one on one atmosphere a clean atmosphere and good conversation, then I'm your gal! please stop by or

profiles.pageTitle: Courtney Hair and Lash at Sola
profiles.bio: 10+ years, but it has been a love of mine forever. I graduated with honors from the Aveda Institute Denver. Come on in and let me make your hair dreams real! I love creating either a 'to the scalp' blonde highlight or lived in blondes and specialize in grey coverage. I have been doing lash extensions for about 8 years and LOVE them. If you are looking for a solution to streamlining your daily beauty routine, look no further! Eyelash extensions are your solution!

profiles.bio: Kiki’s Hair Shop is a premier hair salon in Lafayette, Colorado, specializing in luxury hair extensions, advanced blonde services, custom hair color, and professional smoothing treatments. We focus on individualized appointments, ensuring a private and personalized experience for each client without the hassle of double booking. As a Certified Great Lengths Keratin Bond Professional in addition to Bellami and DreamCatchers Beaded Wefts Certified Professional, I offer expert extension services suitable for all hair types, utilizing over 25 premium extension vendors. Our salon is renowned for balayage, foil highlights, lived-in blondes, dimensional brunettes, platinum blonde transformations, gray blending, and smoothing treatments. Each service is meticulously tailored to align with your hair goals, lifestyle, and maintenance needs. Schedule your appointment online today to experience the Kiki’s Hair Shop difference.
